titleStmt.title: SII 37.386: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 386. (A.R. No. B 33 of 1941-42.) Pōrumāmiḷḷa, Badvel Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Pillar (second) in the Veraṇḍah in front of the Lakshmīkāntasvāmi temple.
This is dated Śaka 1469 (expired), Parābhava, Chaitra, śu. 11, corresponding to 1547 A.D., March 31, Thursday.

It records the remission of the taxes on barbers in all the villages of the Ghaṇḍikōṭa and Sakali-sīmas which were held as nāyaṅkara by Nandēla Timmarāju, under the orders of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāju Rāmappayyadēva-Mahārāju to Koṇḍōju, son of Timmōju of Kandanavōlu. The gift was made in the presence of the gods Virūpāksha and Viṭhalēśvara on the bank of the Tuṅgabhadrā.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāha
na śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1469 Agunē
ṭi parābhava saṁvatsara cayatra śuda
11 lu . śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparama
mēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrasadāsi
vadēva mahārāyalu vidyānagarama
ṁdppiddu pṛdhivi sāmrājyaṁ sēyucuṁḍaṁ
gānu śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarā
ju rāmappayya dēvamahārājula Ānati
ni tuṁgabhadrātīramaṁdu śrī virūpākṣa śrī
viṭhalēśvarula sannidhini kaṁdanavōliṁ ti
ṁmōju koḍuku koṁḍōjuku

maṁgaḷapaṁnnu sarvvamānyaṁ
gānu manniṁci yistimi . Ani rā
marājuṁgāru naṁdēla tiṁmarā
jugārikiṁnni mā nāyaṁkarānaku
cellē ghaṁḍikōṭa sakali śīmala
kuṁ jellē grāmālaku maṁgaḷla paṁnu sa
rvvamānyaṁgānu trivācakaṁgānu ma
nniṁci Istimi . śāsanālu vēIṁcca
maṁṭēnu naṁdēla tiṁmarājuṁgā
ru vēIṁccina dharmaśāsanaṁ sakali
sīmalōnu ghaṁḍi

mānyaṁsēstimi Iṁdku tappi yavaru
pannugonnānu vāraṇāśilōnu gōha
tyabraṁhmatya śrīhatya cēsina pā
pānabōvuvāru tama celeliki tapina
vāru ta
lli taṁḍṟla vadhiṁ
cina pāpānabō
vuvāru
Aṭani yici
na dharmaśāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 37.386 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
